comments.author: @NICEGLOBE05
comments.text: Let’s break down the actual science behind the title: yes, countries like Latvia or Ukraine have a higher female population, but that gap drastically widens in the older generation due to life expectancy differences. The young, modern women in these nations are highly educated, career-oriented, and independent—they aren't just 'waiting' around. Fascinating look into demographic realities!
